faqSection1.description: Find answers to common questions about our platform and services.

faqs.question: What is Sazzad Inventory & Logistics?
faqs.answer: Sazzad is a comprehensive inventory management and logistics platform that helps businesses track inventory, manage shipments, optimize supply chains, and gain real-time visibility into their operations. Our platform is designed for businesses of all sizes, from small startups to large enterprises.

faqs.question: How does Sazzad differ from other inventory management solutions?
faqs.answer: Sazzad combines powerful inventory management with advanced logistics capabilities in a single platform. Unlike traditional solutions that focus on just one aspect, we provide end-to-end visibility across your entire supply chain. Our AI-powered features, real-time tracking, and intuitive interface make it easy for teams to collaborate and make data-driven decisions.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial available?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial on all our plans. No credit card is required to start your trial. You'll have full access to all features so you can experience the power of Sazzad firsthand.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans. All payments are processed securely through our payment partners.

faqs.question: Can I change my plan later?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle. If you upgrade mid-cycle, we'll prorate the difference.

faqs.question: Is there a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No, all our plans are month-to-month. You can cancel anytime with no penalties. For annual plans, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied.

faqs.question: What features are included in the Starter plan?
faqs.answer: The Starter plan includes up to 1,000 inventory items, basic inventory tracking, 3 team members, and email support. It's perfect for small businesses just getting started with inventory management.

faqs.question: Do you offer real-time tracking?
faqs.answer: Yes! Real-time tracking is available on our Professional and Business plans. You can track shipments, inventory levels, and orders in real-time with instant updates.

faqs.question: Can I integrate Sazzad with my existing systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We offer API access on our Professional and Business plans. We also have pre-built integrations with popular e-commerce platforms, ERPs, and shipping carriers.

faqs.question: What kind of support do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer email support on all plans, with response times varying by plan. Professional and Business plans include priority chat support with faster response times. Enterprise customers get a dedicated account manager.

faqs.question: Do you have customer support on weekends?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our support team is available 24/7 for emergency issues. For non-urgent questions, our team responds during business hours in your timezone.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Security is our top priority. We use bank-level encryption (256-bit SSL) for all data transmission. Our servers are hosted in secure data centers with 24/7 monitoring, regular security audits, and compliance with industry standards.

contact.title: Still have questions?
contact.description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat with our friendly team.

faqSection2.description: Find answers to common questions about our platform and services. Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.

Our platform is designed for businesses of all sizes, from small startups to large enterprises.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial available?

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?

faqs.question: What features are included in the Starter plan?
faqs.answer: The Starter plan includes up to 1,000 inventory items, basic inventory tracking, 3 team members, and email support. It's perfect for small businesses just getting started with inventory management.

faqs.question: Do you offer real-time tracking?
faqs.answer: Yes! Real-time tracking is available on our Professional and Business plans. You can track shipments, inventory levels, and orders in real-time with instant updates.

faqs.question: Can I integrate Sazzad with my existing systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We offer API access on our Professional and Business plans. We also have pre-built integrations with popular e-commerce platforms, ERPs, and shipping carriers.

faqs.question: What kind of support do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer email support on all plans, with response times varying by plan. Professional and Business plans include priority chat support with faster response times. Enterprise customers get a dedicated account manager.

faqs.question: Do you have customer support on weekends?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our support team is available 24/7 for emergency issues. For non-urgent questions, our team responds during business hours in your timezone.

faqs.question: How do I get started with Sazzad?
faqs.answer: Getting started is easy! After signing up, you'll have access to our onboarding wizard that guides you through setting up your inventory, adding team members, and configuring your preferences. We also offer video tutorials and documentation to help you along the way.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Security is our top priority. We use bank-level encryption (256-bit SSL) for all data transmission. Our servers are hosted in secure data centers with 24/7 monitoring, regular security audits, and compliance with industry standards.

faqs.question: Can I have multiple users on my account?
faqs.answer: Yes! All our plans include multiple users. The Starter plan includes 3 users, Professional includes 10, and Business includes unlimited users. You can add or remove users at any time from your account settings.
